ddls:
CREATE TABLE "satellite_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data point */,
  "field_id" INTEGER /* ID of the field in the data format */,
  "field_type" TEXT /* Type of the field (e.g., Float, Uchar) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the field */,
  "format" TEXT /* Format of the field */,
  "binary_bytes" INTEGER /* Size of the field in bytes */,
  "binary_offset" TEXT /* Offset of the field in the binary data */,
  "system_id" INTEGER /* ID of the satellite system */,
  "signal_id" INTEGER /* ID of the signal type */,
  "data_version" TEXT /* Version of the data */,
  "data_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data was collected */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the data (e.g., GPS receiver, satellite) */,
  "data_accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the data */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the data point */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the data point */,
  "altitude" REAL /* Altitude of the data point */,
  "data_status" TEXT /* Status of the data (e.g., active, archived) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_satellite_data_data_source FOREIGN KEY ("data_source") REFERENCES data_sources ("data_source_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_satellite_data_signal_id FOREIGN KEY ("signal_id") REFERENCES signal_types ("signal_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_satellite_data_data_version FOREIGN KEY ("data_version") REFERENCES data_versions ("version_number"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_satellite_data_field_id FOREIGN KEY ("field_id") REFERENCES fields ("field_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_satellite_data_system_id FOREIGN KEY ("system_id") REFERENCES satellite_systems ("system_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fields" (
  "field_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each field */,
  "field_name" TEXT /* Name of the field */,
  "field_type" TEXT /* Type of the field (e.g., Float, Uchar) */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the field */,
  "data_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data type */,
  "min_value" REAL /* Minimum valid value for the field */,
  "max_value" REAL /* Maximum valid value for the field */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("field_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fields_data_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_type_id") REFERENCES data_types ("data_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "satellite_systems" (
  "system_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each satellite system */,
  "system_name" TEXT /* Name of the satellite system */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the satellite system */,
  "frequency_band" TEXT /* Frequency band used by the satellite system */,
  "system_status" TEXT /* Operational status of the satellite system */,
  "system_version" TEXT /* Version of the satellite system */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("system_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "signal_types" (
  "signal_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each signal type */,
  "signal_name" TEXT /* Name of the signal type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the signal type */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of the signal */,
  "modulation" TEXT /* Modulation type of the signal */,
  "signal_status" TEXT /* Status of the signal (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("signal_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login time of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Whether the user account is active */,
  "user_status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES roles ("role_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_types" (
  "data_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data type */,
  "data_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the data type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "data_source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_versions" (
  "data_version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data version */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number of the data */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the changes in this version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_version_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "role_permissions" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* ID of the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id", "permission_id")
)
